rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION

rulings.Case Title: CITY STORAGE VS. UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, May 10, 2010, line 7, PETITIONER CITY STORAGE Motion for Judgment on Peremptory Writ of Mandate. Pursuant to CCP section 1087, the court grants an alternative writ of mandate commanding respondent to file an opposition to the petition by May 27, 2010. Petitioner has until June 7, 2010 to reply. The hearing on the writ will be held on June 10, 2010. =(302/EHG)
